caption: A large group of people, predominantly men, are seated in rows within a formal assembly hall. Most of the attendees are dressed in white traditional Indian attire, while several individuals wear orange turbans or headscarves. They are seated in structured wooden seating areas with light-colored upholstery. The room features a light blue carpeted floor and dark wooden paneling. The individuals are mostly seated still, facing toward the front of the hall, with some engaged in quiet conversation. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or electronic equipment in the frames. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static; the individuals stay in their positions, and there is no significant movement or change in the composition, reflecting a moment of attentive listening or waiting during a formal proceeding.
